titleStmt.title: SII 9.505: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 505. (A.R. No. 177 of 1924.) ON THE WEST WALL OF THE THIRD PRAKARA OF THE KALAHASTISVARA TEMPLE AT KALAHASTI, CHANDRAGIRI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1438, Dhātu, Phālguṇa, ba. 10, Maṅgaḷavāra, Śravaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1517 March 17, Tuesday, in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya. It records a gift of money made by the Sthānikas of the temple to Māde-Nāyaka for the service of the god Kāḷahasti-Nayinār at Kāḷahasti, also called Mummuḍi-Chōḷapura, in Āttūr-nāḍu, a sub-division of Jayaṁgoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍala. The gift was made for the merit of the king. The manner of distributing the offerings among the servants of the temple is also specified.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti . śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrakruṣṇarāyamahārāyaru pruthuvīrājyaṁ māḍuta yiralāgi śālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1438 neya
dhātusaṁvatsarada phālguṇa ba 10 maṁgaḷavāra śravaṇanakṣatradalu jayaṁgoṁḍacōḷamaṁḍalada Ātūranāḍa trikāḷahastiyāda muṁmaḍicōḷapurada nayinārū śrīkāḷaha
stinayināradēvara śrībhaṁḍārada stānadavarū mādenāyakarige dharmaśāsanava māḍikoṭṭa pariyeṁteṁdare naṁma svāmi kruṣṇarāyaSpace for about 15 letters is left blank here.
mahārāyarige pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēkeṁdu na(ṁ)mma puṁṇyavāgabēkū Eṁdu śrīkāḷahasti �yośvaradēvara Amrutapaḍiya gōdhiya khajāyada harivāṇaSpace for about 15 letters is left blank here.
1 kaṁ khajhāya 52 dadhyōhnada harivāṇa 1 yiṣṭake koṭadu madavoḷagaṇa meSpace for about 15 letters is left blank here.Space for about 15 letters is left blank here.
ya voḷagāda hoṁnanū śrīkāḷahastīśvaradēvara Amrutapaḍi nayivēdyake Udayakāladalli dadhyōhnada harivāṇa 1 kaṁ dēvara Amrutapaḍiya koḷagadali Aki va 1
vondu koḷaga hesaṟa bēḷe paḍi . tupa paḍi . mosaru paḍi 4 mēlōgara Upu meṇasu śuṁṭhi Ēlaki khārageṇasu yiṣṭanū kūḍisi dadhyōhnada harivāṇa voṁdu madhyāṁhakāladali
dēvara Amrutapaḍi naivēdyake harivāṇa 1 kaṁ gōdhiya khajāya 52 kke gōdhi va 1 . Aki va . bella bisige 1 . tupa va . Ēlaki sahā harivāṇa 1 kaṁ khajāya 52 �yo māḍuva bage 2 Era
ḍanū dharmma tapade Ācaṁdrārkastāyiyāgi stānadavarū Ellarū kūḍi naḍesaluḷavarū naḍasalaṟiyadidare vāraṇāśiyali gaṁgātīradali taṁma taṁde tāya koṁda pāpadalli hō
galuḷavarū yidake sākṣi śrīkāḷahastīśvaradēvarū maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī . baradāta mādenāyakara sēnabōva kōnapanūSpace for about 15 letters is left blank here.
śrīkāḷahastiyīśvaradēvarige mādenāyakaru samarpisida dadhyōhnada harivāṇa voṁdaṟa dharma kartāra nākaṟali voṁdu pālanū vīrabhadradēvara guḍiya jaṁgama liṁgayana maga vīra
yage koṭiU stānadavarū Ellarū putrapautraparaṁpareyāgi naḍasaluḷavarū gōdhiya khajhūyada dharma kartāreya khajhūya 13 nū stānikarige 7 kruṣṇabhaṭarige 2 Āruguṁde saṁgarasara maga tipayage 2 ḷana māniga 2 nū yi
hadimūrunū yivarugaḷu caṁdrādityavaregū Anubhavisaluḷavaru .
Digital edition of SII 9.505 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
